item.title: About
item.author: masontuckett@proton.me (Mason Tuckett)
item.description: About Me I am currently a full-time student at Weber State University, diligently studying Cybersecurity and Network Management. While attending university, I have made it a key priority to self-study and attain any applicable industry-standard certifications; I constantly strive to expand my knowledge. Certifications CompTIA Linux+ - L6JS88LT3FEEQHS1 CompTIA Security+ - R6EZ8J86MMB1QKWP CompTIA Network+ - EBMQ8Z0TGJ411F9Y CompTIA A+ - 26DTYN06MFB4QMC7 ISC2 CC - 2068665 CompTIA ITF+ - 7KXDBYRYQFFQ1ESQ Google IT Support - 69J675FU9XSO Course Related Certifications CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials AWS Academy Cloud Security Builder AWS Academy Cloud Foundations Education BS, Cybersecurity and Network Management - Weber State University
item.content:encoded:
About Me

I am currently a full-time student at Weber State University, diligently studying Cybersecurity and Network Management.

While attending university, I have made it a key priority to self-study and attain any applicable industry-standard certifications; I constantly strive to expand my knowledge.

Certifications

  • CompTIA Linux+ - L6JS88LT3FEEQHS1
  • CompTIA Security+ - R6EZ8J86MMB1QKWP
  • CompTIA Network+ - EBMQ8Z0TGJ411F9Y
  • CompTIA A+ - 26DTYN06MFB4QMC7
  • ISC2 CC - 2068665
  • CompTIA ITF+ - 7KXDBYRYQFFQ1ESQ
  • Google IT Support - 69J675FU9XSO

Course Related Certifications

  • CCNA: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials
  • AWS Academy Cloud Security Builder
  • AWS Academy Cloud Foundations

Education

BS, Cybersecurity and Network Management - Weber State University
August, 2022 - April, 2025

AAS, Cybersecurity and Network Management - Weber State University
August, 2022 - April, 2025

Lesser Education

CP, Cybersecurity and Policy Management - Weber State University
August, 2022 - April, 2025

CP, Cloud Computing Security - Weber State University
August, 2022 - December, 2024

CP, Network Technologies - Weber State University
August, 2022 - December, 2024

CP, Cybersecurity Essentials - Weber State University
August, 2022 - April, 2023

item.title: Contact
item.author: masontuckett@proton.me (Mason Tuckett)

item.content:encoded:
Contact

Socials: LinkedIn, GitHub

If you need to contact me via email: mason@tuckett.xyz

https://github.com/masontuckett/masontuckett.gpg
